title: What Is Python?
description: Let's learn the Python programming language in a fun way!

scenes.speech: Hi! It's Garuchan. Today, let's learn Python together!
scenes.title: Welcome to Python!

scenes.speech: Python is not just a snake. It's a language for talking to computers!
scenes.title: Python = A Programming Language
scenes.content: It is a language used to give instructions to a computer, like writing simple commands.

scenes.speech: When you write print, the computer can show words on the screen!
scenes.title: Show Text with print
scenes.content: If you write print("Hello"), the screen will show Hello!

scenes.speech: Variables are like magic boxes that store things for later!
scenes.title: Variables = Magic Boxes
scenes.content: If you write x = 5, the box named x stores the number 5.

scenes.speech: Great job! You learned the basics of Python!
scenes.title: Lesson Complete!
